abstract.para: A dataset containing all occurrences available in GBIF matching the query: { "and" : [ "TaxonKey is Acacia melleodora Pedley", "HasCoordinate is true" ] } The dataset includes records from the following constituent datasets. The full metadata for each constituent is also included in this archive: 4 records from ALA species sightings and OzAtlas 5 records from Records of the Australian National Botanic Gardens Seedbank 650 records from Flora Atlas N.T. 3 records from N.C.W. Beadle Herbarium (NE) AVH data 1 records from SP - Herbário do Estado "Maria Eneyda P. Kaufmann Fidalgo" - Coleção de Fanerógamas 11 records from James Cook University Herbarium (JCT) AVH data 41 records from Centre for Australian National Biodiversity Research (CANB) AVH data 1 records from CDA - California Department of Food and Agriculture 4 records from SA Flora 7 records from Australian Tropical Herbarium (CNS) AVH data 180 records from BRI AVH Data and Images 264 records from Northern Territory Herbarium (DNA) AVH data 139 records from National Herbarium of Victoria (MEL) AVH data 206 records from Western Australian Herbarium (PERTH) AVH data 182 records from AD AVH Data 4 records from Conservation Atlas Surveys 11 records from iNaturalist Research-grade Observations 130 records from NSW AVH feed
